_comment: ROB-287 Phase C + ROB-309 — sample Hermes-produced composition ingest payload. metadata.investment_stage_run_uuid links back to the stage run for auto-finalize (§D4). symbol_intermediate_report_uuids (ROB-301) + dimension_report_uuids (ROB-308) reference the per-symbol / per-dimension reports this composition consumed; the {{symbol_report_uuid}} / {{dimension_report_uuid}} placeholders are substituted from the symbol-reports / dimension-reports POST responses at runtime. One item carries decision_bucket='new_buy_candidate' + per-item citations to exercise the held-action vs new-candidate bundle grouping (ROB-308 C5). {{...}} placeholders are substituted by the round-trip smoke at runtime.

composition.title: Hermes Advisory — KR intraday (smoke round-trip)
composition.summary: Hold-and-trim bias on single-name concentration. Market regime modest bull, but portfolio concentration overrides aggressive entries.
composition.risk_summary: Concentration: 70% NAV in one name. Recommend trim to <50% NAV before adding new positions.
composition.thesis_text: Bull case from market + foreign-flow stages does not outweigh portfolio concentration risk. Defer new entries; consider scaling out existing single-name position.

items.rationale: Single-name exposure breach: 005930 at 70% NAV. Review before any new entry.
Watch for scale-out opportunity once price reclaims short-term resistance.
Fresh long candidate on foreign net-buy + breadth; advisory only, requires user approval before any entry.
